title.ko: 직물; 제직방법; 직기
title.en: WOVEN FABRICS; METHODS OF WEAVING; LOOMS

definition.ko: 직물과 그 제직방법 사의 구조 또는 재료 형상; 탄성; 신축성에 특징이 있는 것 D03D15/00; 3/00 ; 7/00; 17/00 직물의 종류 투목 직물; 파일직물; 거어즈(gauze); 라페트 직물 또는 스위 블(swivel) 직물 D03D9/00; 27/00; 19/00; 21/00 경사 또는 위사가 특별한 배열을 가지는 것; 달리 분류되지 않는 다중직물 D03D13/00; 11/00 특정물품을 위한 것 D03D1/00 기타 종류 D03D25/00 셀비지 D03D5/00; 47/40 특수한 직물 또는 직기의 특수하지 아니한 제직방법 D03D23/00 직기와 그 제직 방법 수직기 D03D29/00 제직 물품에 특징이 있는 것; 자수식 장식을 위한 라페트 (lappet) 또는 고리; 좁은 리본과 같은 직물을 위한 형; 파일 직물용의 형; 기타 종류의 직물을 위한 형 D03D31/00; 35/00; 39/00; 41/00 구조에 특징이 있는 것; 환상직기; 북집 교환장치를 가지는 것; 위사 자동보충장치를 가지는 것; 북(shuttle)이 없는 직기 D03D37/00; 43/00; 45/00; 47/00 복합직기 D03D33/00 세부와 구조상의 특징 일반 D03D49/00 직기의 구동, 시동, 정지 D03D51/00

title.ko: 특정 물품을 만들기 위하여 설계된 직물
title.en: Woven fabrics; Methods of weaving other than those characterised by the operation of a particular loom

title.ko: 특정 물품을 만들기 위하여 설계된 직물
title.en: Woven fabrics designed to make specified articles
Inflatable articles
Sack- or bag-like articles
Curtain heading tapes

title.ko: 사다리형 테이프(ladder tape)(베네치안 블라인드(Venetian blinds) E06B 9/382)
title.en: Ladder tapes (ladder tapes for venetian blinds E06B0009382000)
Woven fabrics characterised by their shape
Tubular fabrics
Endless fabrics
Fabrics of varying width
Arched, corrugated, or like fabrics
Selvedges
Woven fabrics designed to be resilient, i.e. to recover from compressive stress
Open-work fabrics

title.ko: 달리 분류되지 않는 이중 또는 다중 직물
title.en: Double or multi-ply fabrics not otherwise provided for

title.ko: 포켓, 튜브, 루프, 접힘, 턱(tucks) 또는 플랩(flaps)을 형성한 직물(단일 튜브로 되어 있는 직물 D03D 3/02)
title.en: Fabrics formed with pockets, tubes, loops, folds, tucks or flaps  (fabrics consisting of a single tube D03D0003020000)
Woven fabrics characterised by the special disposition of the warp or weft threads, e.g. with curved weft threads, with discontinuous warp threads, with diagonal warp or weft

title.ko: 사용된 원사 섬유, 필라멘트, 원사, 실 또는 기타 날실 또는 위사 요소의 재료, 구조 또는 구조 특성을 특징으로하는 직물
title.en: Woven fabrics characterised by the material, structure or properties of the fibres, filaments, yarns, threads or other warp or weft elements used

title.ko: 실 또는 실을 구성하는 섬유 또는 필라멘트의 재료에 특징이있는 것
title.en: characterised by the material of the fibres or filaments constituting the yarns or threads
cellulose-based
natural from plants, e.g. cotton
artificial, e.g. viscose
protein-based, e.g. wool or silk
inorganic, e.g. basalt
Metal
Noble metal
Glass
Carbon fibres

title.ko: 합성 폴리머 기반, 예. 폴리 아미드 또는 폴리 에스테르 섬유 (셀룰로오스 기반 인공 섬유 D03D15/225)
title.en: synthetic polymer-based, e.g. polyamide or polyester fibres (cellulose-based artificial fibres D03D0015225000)
Conjugate, i.e. bi- or multicomponent, fibres or filaments
characterised by the structure of the fibres or filaments
Ultrafine fibres, e.g. microfibres or nanofibres
with specific cross-section or surface shape

title.ko: 실 또는 실의 구조에 특징이있는 것
title.en: characterised by the structure of the yarns or threads
with specific twist
with differing diameters
with specific cross-section or surface shape
Flat yarns, e.g. tapes or films

title.ko: 다 성분, 예. 혼방사 또는 실 (다 성분 섬유 또는 필라멘트 D03D15/292)
title.en: multicomponent, e.g. blended yarns or threads (multicomponent fibres or filaments D03D0015292000)

title.ko: 텍스처링 (셔닐 D03D27/18); 컬링; 크림핑
title.en: textured (chenille D03D0027180000); curled; crimped
characterised by the properties of the yarns or threads
magnetic
heat-resistant or fireproof
thermal insulating, e.g. heating or cooling
waterproof or water-repellent
antistatic; electrically conductive
coloured
with optical functions other than colour, e.g. comprising light-emitting fibres
with metallic effect  (metal D03D0015250000)
elastic
Shapes or effects upon shrinkage
Tensile strength
characterised by the coefficients of friction
adhesive; fusible
Stiff materials, e.g. cane or slat
characterised by the warp or weft elements other than yarns or threads
Cords or ropes
Straps, e.g. leather straps
Paper
Metal wires
Scaffolding threads, i.e. threads removed after weaving

title.ko: 짜는 방법으로 인하여 탄성 또는 신축성을 가지는 것(신축성이 있거나 탄성이 있는 실을 사용하는 직물 D03D 15/56)
title.en: Woven fabrics having elastic or stretch properties due to manner of weaving   (fabrics using stretchable or elastic threads D03D0015560000)
Gauze or leno-woven fabrics
Lappet- or swivel-woven fabrics
General weaving methods not special to the production of any particular woven fabric or the use of any particular loom; Weaves not provided for in any other single group
Woven fabrics not otherwise provided for
Woven pile fabrics
wherein the pile is formed by warp or weft
Weft pile fabrics
Warp pile fabrics
Terry fabrics
Fabrics woven face-to-face, e.g. double velvet
wherein pile tufts are inserted during weaving
with tufts around warps
with tufts around wefts
Chenille fabrics
Looms; Methods of weaving characterised by the operation of particular looms
Hand looms
Lappet, swivel or other looms for forming embroidery-like decoration on fabrics

title.ko: 복합직기, 예. 기구의 여하를 불문하고, 2 또는 그 이상의 직기가 조합된 것 (D03D 35/00이 우선)
title.en: Multiple looms, i.e. two or more looms assembled together, whether or not they have mechanisms in common (D03D0035000000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 세폭직기, 예. 리본이나 세폭직물을 짜는 직기 (D03D 47/00이 우선)
title.en: Smallware looms, i.e. looms for weaving ribbons or other narrow fabrics (D03D0047000000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 환상 직기(환상 또는 다각형상으로 배치된 여러가지 천을 짜는 직기 D03D 33/00)
title.en: Circular looms (looms for weaving separate fabrics disposed in a circle or polygon D03D0033000000)

title.ko: 파일직기
title.en: Pile-fabric looms
Axminster looms, i.e. wherein pile tufts are inserted during weaving
Spool Axminster looms
Tuft yarn tube or spool frames
Gripper Axminster looms
Wire-tapestry looms, e.g. for weaving velvet or Brussels or Wilton carpets, the pile being formed over weftwise wires
Mechanisms for operating the pile wires
Construction of the pile wires, e.g. pile wires which cut
Double-plush looms, i.e. for weaving two pile fabrics face-to-face
Separating the two plush layers, e.g. by cutting
Looms forming pile over warpwise wires
Terry looms

title.ko: 직기상에서 파일을 절단하는 기구(파일절단와이어 D03D 39/14; 2매의 파일 층의 분리 D03D 39/18)
title.en: Devices for cutting the pile on the loom (pile wires which cut D03D0039140000;separating two plush layers D03D0039180000)
Looms not otherwise provided for, e.g. for weaving chenille yarn; Details peculiar to these looms
Looms with change-boxes
with drop boxes
Operating mechanisms
with rotary boxes
Operating mechanisms
Weft catchers, i.e. means for preventing entanglement of wefts

title.ko: 자동 위사보충장치가 있는 직기(세폭 직기의 자동보충 D03D35/00, 순환직기의 것 D03D37/00)
title.en: Looms with automatic weft replenishment (automatic replenishment in smallware looms D03D0035000000, in circular looms D03D0037000000)

title.ko: 보충제어
title.en: Controlling replenishment

title.ko: 보충개시를 위한 경사 피일러(weft feelers) 또는 기타 검출기(위사정지 D03D 51/34)
title.en: Pirn feelers or other detectors for initiating replenishment (weft stop motions D03D0051340000)
mechanical
of the side-slip type
electrical
optical
Storing the need for replenishment or the colour required until the spent shuttle returns to the replenishing end of the loom
selecting thereby weft of correct colour

title.ko: 북이 북집에 잘못 들어가 있을 경우의 보충방지용 셔틀피일러(shuttle feelers) 또는 기타 기구(북정지 기구 D03D 51/40)
title.en: Shuttle feelers or other devices for preventing replenishment if shuttle is incorrectly positioned in shuttle box (shuttle stop motions D03D0051400000)
Changing bobbins, cops or other loom components carried by the shuttle
effected with shuttle in normal shuttle box
effected otherwise than in normal box

for one type of thread, e.g. same colour
rotary
for several types of thread, e.g. multicolour

fresh shuttle being substituted for spent shuttle in the same cell of shuttle box

the spent shuttle being received in the normal cell and the fresh shuttle being picked from the extra cell
the spent shuttle being received in the extra cell and the fresh shuttle being picked from the normal cell
Magazines
for one type of thread, e.g. single colour
for several types of threads, e.g. multicolour

title.ko: 위사단의 절단, 파지, 취급 또는 정리
title.en: Cutting, holding, manipulating, or disposing of, weft ends
Cutting weft of depleted shuttle near shuttle and holding the piece attached to the fabric
Cutting fresh weft and holding the piece attached to the fabric
Cutting depleted and fresh wefts at selvedge
Removing tip bunch or fresh weft end from fresh bobbin
substantially by air stream or suction

title.ko: 절단위사단의 폐기부분의 정리(D03D 45/58이 우선)
title.en: Disposing of waste pieces of cut weft end (D03D0045580000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 위사저장체가 개구중을 지나지 아니하는 직기, 예. 무북직기, 더미 (dummy) 셔틀직기(환상직기 D03D 37/00)
title.en: Looms in which bulk supply of weft does not pass through shed, e.g. shuttleless looms, gripper shuttle looms, dummy shuttle looms (circular looms D03D0037000000)

title.ko: 연속위사의 루프가 들어갈 수 있는 것, 예. 2본의 횡입 (D03D 47/27이 우선)
title.en: wherein loops of continuous weft thread are inserted, i.e. double picks (D03D0047270000 takes precedence)
by a reciprocating needle having a permanently-threaded eye
by a pivoted having a permanently-threaded eye
the path of the needle being modified by cams, linkages, or other means
by a forked needle pushing loop of weft through shed

title.ko: 1본횡입, 즉 각각의 횡입이 개구를 가진 것(D03D 47/27이 우선)
title.en: wherein single picks of weft thread are inserted, i.e. with shedding between each pick (D03D0047270000 takes precedence)
by a gripper needle taking the end of the weft through the shed
by a gripper needle entering the shed empty and drawing the weft as it retracts
two weft inserters meeting at or near the middle of the shed and transferring the weft from one to the other

title.ko: 삽입체의 실을 잡아 끄는 장치에 특징이 있는 것
title.en: Constructional features of the thread-engaging device on the inserters

title.en: Thread grippers (in dummy or gripper shuttles D03J0005060000)

title.ko: 그리퍼 셔틀 또는 더미 셔틀에 의하는 것(이동파상 개구직기 D03D 47/26, 셔틀을 위한 삽입 기계 D03D 49/24)
